entries.sentence: I use a weather app to check tomorrow's forecast.
entries.chinese: app = 应用程序；我用天气应用程序查看明天的天气预报。

entries.sentence: This application helps students practise new vocabulary.
entries.chinese: application = 应用程序；这个应用程序帮助学生练习新词汇。

entries.sentence: This camera takes clear photos in low light.
entries.chinese: camera = 相机；这台相机在光线暗时也能拍出清晰照片。

entries.sentence: This CD contains all the songs from the concert.
entries.chinese: CD = 光盘；这张光盘收录了演唱会的所有歌曲。

entries.sentence: Please turn off your cell phone during the film.
entries.chinese: cell phone = 手机；电影播放期间请关掉手机。

entries.sentence: We bought a digital clock for the kitchen.
entries.chinese: digital = 数字式的；我们给厨房买了一个数字时钟。

entries.sentence: You can download the map before your trip.
entries.chinese: download = 下载；旅行前你可以下载地图。

entries.sentence: We watched the film on DVD last night.
entries.chinese: DVD = 数字视频光盘；我们昨晚用光盘看了这部电影。

entries.sentence: The library sends electronic reminders for late books.
entries.chinese: electronic = 电子的；图书馆会发送电子提醒，通知逾期未还的书。

entries.sentence: The internet connection at the hotel was very slow.
entries.chinese: internet = 互联网；酒店的网络连接很慢。

entries.sentence: I take my laptop to the library when I study.
entries.chinese: laptop = 笔记本电脑；我学习时会把笔记本电脑带到图书馆。

entries.sentence: You can use the mobile version of the website.
entries.chinese: mobile = 移动版的；你可以使用这个网站的移动版本。

entries.sentence: We booked our train tickets online.
entries.chinese: online = 在线；我们在网上预订了火车票。

entries.sentence: Choose a password that is difficult to guess.
entries.chinese: password = 密码；选择一个难以猜出的密码。

entries.sentence: The new software works on any modern PC.
entries.chinese: PC = 个人电脑；这款新软件可以在任何现代个人电脑上运行。

entries.sentence: My phone ran out of battery on the way home.
entries.chinese: phone = 手机；回家路上我的手机没电了。

entries.sentence: The words on the screen are too small to read.
entries.chinese: screen = 屏幕；屏幕上的字太小，看不清。

entries.sentence: We installed new drawing software at school.
entries.chinese: software = 软件；我们在学校安装了新的绘图软件。

entries.sentence: She reads electronic books on her tablet.
entries.chinese: tablet = 平板电脑；她用平板电脑阅读电子书。

entries.sentence: Modern technology makes it easier to work from home.
entries.chinese: technology = 技术；现代技术让居家办公更容易。

entries.sentence: Please upload your photo before Friday.
entries.chinese: upload = 上传；请在星期五前上传你的照片。

entries.sentence: I made a short video of our school concert.
entries.chinese: video = 视频；我为学校音乐会拍了一段短视频。

entries.sentence: The teacher showed us a video clip about space.
entries.chinese: video clip = 视频片段；老师给我们看了一段关于太空的视频。

entries.sentence: This video game is more fun with two players.
entries.chinese: video game = 电子游戏；这款电子游戏两个人玩更有趣。

entries.sentence: The museum website lists its opening times.
entries.chinese: website = 网站；博物馆网站列出了开放时间。

entries.sentence: She speaks English with a strong French accent.
entries.chinese: accent = 口音；她说英语时带有浓重的法国口音。

entries.sentence: I saw an advert for the new sports centre.
entries.chinese: advert = 广告；我看到了一则新体育中心的广告。

entries.sentence: The café uses social media to advertise its lunches.
entries.chinese: advertise = 做广告；咖啡馆利用社交媒体宣传午餐。

entries.sentence: The advertisement showed the price of each phone.
entries.chinese: advertisement = 广告；这则广告展示了每款手机的价格。

entries.sentence: I advise you to save a copy of the document.
entries.chinese: advise = 建议；我建议你保存一份文件副本。

entries.sentence: The school will announce the competition results tomorrow.
entries.chinese: announce = 宣布；学校明天将公布比赛结果。

entries.sentence: We heard an announcement about the delayed train.
entries.chinese: announcement = 公告；我们听到了一则关于火车晚点的通知。

entries.sentence: I asked the assistant how to reset my password.
entries.chinese: ask = 询问；我问工作人员怎样重置密码。

entries.sentence: Please call me when your train arrives.
entries.chinese: call = 打电话；火车到站时请给我打电话。

entries.sentence: Please confirm your email address before continuing.
entries.chinese: confirm = 确认；继续操作前请确认你的电子邮箱地址。

entries.sentence: We had a long conversation about online safety.
entries.chinese: conversation = 交谈；我们就网络安全进行了长时间交谈。

entries.sentence: Can you describe the person you saw?
entries.chinese: describe = 描述；你能描述一下你看到的那个人吗？

entries.sentence: The hotel description says every room has internet access.
entries.chinese: description = 描述；酒店说明写着每个房间都能上网。

entries.sentence: The website gives details about the course.
entries.chinese: detail = 详情；网站提供了课程的详细信息。

entries.sentence: I used to dial up the internet through our phone line.
entries.chinese: dial up = 拨号上网；我过去通过家里的电话线上网。

entries.sentence: We need to discuss the problem before replying.
entries.chinese: discuss = 讨论；回复前我们需要讨论这个问题。

entries.sentence: Send your enquiry to the address on the website.
entries.chinese: enquiry = 询问；请把你的咨询发送到网站上的地址。

entries.sentence: The reporter interviewed the actor after the show.
entries.chinese: interview = 采访；演出结束后，记者采访了那位演员。

entries.sentence: I wrote a letter to thank my host family.
entries.chinese: letter = 信；我写信感谢寄宿家庭。

entries.sentence: I checked the meaning of the word online.
entries.chinese: meaning = 含义；我在网上查了这个词的含义。

entries.sentence: He forgot to mention the change of meeting time.
entries.chinese: mention = 提到；他忘了提到会议时间的变更。

entries.sentence: How do you pronounce this name?
entries.chinese: pronounce = 发音；这个名字怎么读？

entries.sentence: Listening to podcasts can improve your pronunciation.
entries.chinese: pronunciation = 发音；听播客可以改善你的发音。

entries.sentence: I sent a quick reply to her message.
entries.chinese: reply = 回复；我很快回复了她的消息。

entries.sentence: I sent Dad a text message when I arrived.
entries.chinese: text message = 短信；我到达时给爸爸发了一条短信。
